title: Supplemental files for: Genetic strain diversity of multi-host RNA viruses that infect a wide range of pollinators and associates is shaped by geographic origins
author: Dobelmann, Jana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
2 files: 

 Supplementary Materials pollinator RNA virus.docx contains supplemental figures and tables. 

 Virus detection PCR.xlsx contains detailed information on PCR results of virus detection assays and virus replication assays.
